binDir.description: Path to Swift CLI binaries directory

accessFile.description: Path to access control config file (default: ~/.config/apple-pim/access.json)

caldavServerUrl.description: iCloud CalDAV server URL (defaults to MobileMe account config or https://caldav.icloud.com)

caldavUsername.description: Apple ID / iCloud username for CalDAV auth

caldavPassword.description: Apple app-specific password for CalDAV auth. Prefer caldavPasswordEnvVar instead of storing it here.

caldavPasswordEnvVar.description: Environment variable name holding the Apple app-specific password (default: ICLOUD_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD)

calendarAliasesFile.description: Path to a JSON file mapping friendly calendar names to exact CalDAV URLs or paths
